hooks.command: bash -c 'h="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/hooks/block-docker-privesc.sh"; if [ -f "$h" ]; then exec bash "$h"; fi'
bash -c 'h="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/hooks/block-merged-pr-commit.sh"; if [ -f "$h" ]; then exec bash "$h"; fi'
bash -c 'h="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/hooks/block-unresolved-cr-merge.sh"; if [ -f "$h" ]; then exec bash "$h"; fi'
bash -c 'h="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/hooks/block-glm-external-writes.sh"; if [ -f "$h" ]; then exec bash "$h"; fi'
bash -c 'h="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/hooks/block-graphify-egress.sh"; if [ -f "$h" ]; then exec bash "$h"; fi'
bash -c 'h="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/hooks/block-rogue-codex-wsl.sh"; if [ -f "$h" ]; then exec bash "$h"; fi'

bash -c 'h="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/hooks/block-lesson-enforcement-writes.sh"; if [ -f "$h" ]; then exec bash "$h"; elif [ "${HIMMEL_LESSON_LOOP:-0}" = "1" ]; then echo "block-lesson-enforcement-writes: hook script missing while HIMMEL_LESSON_LOOP=1 (stale checkout?) - failing closed" >&2; exit 2; fi'
bash -c 'h="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/hooks/guard-implementor-dispatch.sh"; if [ -f "$h" ]; then exec bash "$h"; fi'
bash -c 'h="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/hooks/inject-where-are-we.sh"; if [ -f "$h" ]; then exec bash "$h"; fi'
bash -c 'h="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/hooks/inject-doc-freshness.sh"; if [ -f "$h" ]; then exec bash "$h"; fi'
bash -c 'h="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/hooks/inject-worktree-nudge.sh"; if [ -f "$h" ]; then exec bash "$h"; fi'
bash -c 'h="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/hooks/refresh-where-are-we-on-end.sh"; if [ -f "$h" ]; then exec bash "$h"; fi'
bash -c 'h="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/hooks/jira-nudge-on-end.sh"; if [ -f "$h" ]; then exec bash "$h"; fi'
bash -c 'h="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/hooks/telegram-session-end.sh"; if [ -f "$h" ]; then exec bash "$h"; fi'
bash -c 'h="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/hooks/telegram-notification.sh"; if [ -f "$h" ]; then exec bash "$h"; fi'
